title: Land Developer
body:
# LAND DEVELOPER
_Another land protection mod in the Fexcraft series of terrain protection mods._    
**The mod is still somewhat WIP, but usable!**


### Features
1. Multiple protection layers and access options.
- Chunk - > District -> (Municipality/Town) -> County -> Region
- each layer can be sold/bought and traded
- each chunk can be owned by any of the layers, players or companies
- option to disable explosions on district basis
- Districts, Municipalities, Counties and Regions can have custom icons/colors
- integrated money system with FSMM
- chunks and players are taxable (wip)
- and more...
2. Easy to use ingame interface (GUI) instead of countless commands with arguments.
3. Default Chat override with color support and nicknames (**optional**)
4. Discord Bot Integration (**optional**)
5. Dynmap integration for the various layers (**optional**)

### Planned Features
- in-chunk properties, for example to rent apartments in a building
- 'online-store' to buy buildings to speed up land development
- companies led by players
- configurable resource spawns and processing plants to create goods circulation
- and more!

### More?
If you have suggestions or ideas you can share them on my [discord here]([https://discord.com/invite/aZUnJ6mD9U](https://discord.com/invite/aZUnJ6mD9U))!

### FaQ
Q: All this County and Region stuff sounds so complicated! Do I have to use it?    
A: No, all above Municipality is completely optional, you can ignore it at begin and use it once your server/world is more populated.

Q: After installing I get "no permission" when trying to break/place block, what to do?    
A: By default wilderness (unclaimed land) is protected, this is a config setting which can be changed. Alternatively, just claim land!

Q: How do I get money?    
A: This mod is mainly intended for servers (although it works in singleplayer too). Each server may want to setup their economy differently.
You can use other mods like FSMM-Shop, CustomNPCs, pCMDs, etc to setup the optimal way for your project.

Q: How to I start out?     
A: At complete begin, use "/mun create" to create a municipality ("town/settlement"). You need money for that, the fee can be seen using "/ld fees".
Creating a municipality also creates a district. Use "/dis" to access district UI, "/mun" for municipality and "/ck"  for chunk.

Q: How do I claim?    
A: Use "/ck claim" if you stand in your claimed area, otherwise, use "/ck claim <district_id>", the district id you can get from the district screen. Please remember when opening UIs, by default the data about the place you are standing in is displayed!

Q: How do I access mail?    
A: Use the "/ld" command and go to "Mailbox". To access Municipality mail, access it via "/mun", it can only be read by mayor, or staff that has the "read mail" permission.

Q: How do I deposit money into my Municipality?    
A: In the main screen of the ATM, click the button to change Account, from there select your Municipality's Account (Mayor and council members with the according perm can access it), from there do a deposit as usual, the money will go into your Municipality Account directly.

Q: Is there an admin mode?    
A: /ld admin - note it toggles off on relogin, also use the command again to toggle off

Q: How to disable the creation of Municipalities?    
A: Disable it in the Wilderness County's Norms (you may have to activate admin mode), then only players with a permit can create a Municipality (note: permits are WIP)

Q: Where do I get the discord bot from?    
A: You can ask on our discord to get an invite link to the official one hosted by fexcraft.net or get the jar to host your own.

Q: I have more questions!    
A: You can ask on our discord :] (please note it's a discord for multiple mods, so ask in the landdev channel).
